settings.heading: We are here to help.
settings.lede: Questions about Kevin®, your order, setup, or warranty? Reach Mitipi using the details below.
settings.cta_subheading: Configure your color and continue to checkout.

settings.contact_3_value: Mitipi AG · Passage du Cardinal 11 · Bluefactory · CH-1700 Fribourg · Switzerland

settings.heading: How can we help?
settings.body: Quick answers for orders, setup, and warranty.

settings.question: How do I order Kevin?
settings.answer: Configure your color at mitipi.eu/pages/configure and complete purchase through secure Shopify checkout. Free delivery across Europe on qualifying orders.

settings.question: I need help with setup.
settings.answer: See our setup guide at mitipi.eu/pages/setup-guide. For hands-on help, email hello@lurafi.com with your device serial number and a short description of the issue.

settings.question: My Kevin stopped working.
settings.answer: Kevin includes a 3-year Swiss warranty. Contact us with your serial number (on the bottom of the device) and order reference. We will guide you through repair or replacement.

settings.question: Press or partnership inquiry?
settings.answer: Email press@lurafi.com for media requests, product photos, and spokesperson availability. For B2B partnerships, include your company name and region in your message.

settings.title: Orders & checkout
settings.body: Configure your Kevin and complete purchase through secure Shopify checkout on mitipi.eu. Free delivery across Europe on qualifying orders. Taxes calculated at checkout.

settings.title: Warranty repairs
settings.body: If Kevin no longer works, contact us with your serial number (on the bottom of the device) and order reference. We will guide you through repair or replacement under the 3-year Swiss warranty.
